comment: Synthetic metastatic urothelial carcinoma (bladder primary), male 70, ECOG 1, no severe diabetes/neuropathy/ocular contraindications to enfortumab vedotin. Plan target IND-UROTHELIAL-METASTATIC-1L-EV-PEMBRO (EV-302: mOS 31.5 vs 16.1 mo platinum doublet, 2023). Drift: ALGO-UROTHELIAL-METASTATIC-1L step 1 uses free-text 'Patient eligible for EV+pembro' which has no matching disease-scoped RF, so the if_false branch fires and engine routes to IND-UROTHELIAL-METASTATIC-1L-PLATINUM-CHEMO-AVELUMAB (cisplatin+gem then avelumab maintenance). Drift acknowledged — RF authoring (RF-UROTHELIAL-EV-PEMBRO-ELIGIBLE / RF-UROTHELIAL-EV-CONTRAINDICATED) tracked separately. EV-PEMBRO is presented as alternative track for HCP consideration.
